notes: Bound-booklet export (v0.3-booklet.md): turn a series into a home-bindable A5-on-A4 booklet. Big multi-turn feature; Task 3 (imposed render) + Task 4 (webfont) need an author physical-printer check (gated).

chunks.notes: DONE. TDD: tools/test-booklet.js (exact assertions, test-manifest idiom) FAIL -> js/booklet.js pure impose()/sequential() -> PASS. impose(8)=[{front:[8,1],back:[2,7]},{front:[6,3],back:[4,5]}]; impose(6) pads to 8 with nulls. Verify: node tools/test-booklet.js; all suites green. Idempotent: js/booklet.js exists with impose in api.

DONE. Registry 'Bind into a booklet' selection (letters with text only; textless disabled+reason), date order + up/down reorder (keyboard), compose logical pages (title / per-letter facts+letter / plates / colophon), paginate by measuring against the A5 content box. Verify: node --check; browser. BIG.

DONE. printBooklet(model, rows, opts) in js/print.js: title/facts/letter(paginated)/plates/colophon/bind leaves, sequential two-up on A4 landscape (@page booklet in print.css), blank-leaf padding for odd totals. bk-print button wired in landing.js. Root-caused+fixed a real bug: pagination probe had no intrinsic size outside the .booklet-sheet flex context (maxH≈0, 3000+ leaf fragmentation) — pinned probe to 148.5mm x 210mm. Also fixed on-screen preview clipping (aspect-ratio card + fixed-pt fonts) by switching to auto-height like .sheet. Verified in-browser: 3-letter compose (9/16 leaves, byte-exact 7-leaf letter reconstruction), blank-padding path (7->8 leaves via direct TesseraPrint.printBooklet calls), no console errors, 375px no overflow. Gate 1 green. Idempotent: TesseraPrint.printBooklet in api; signature mode not yet implemented so re-running is safe.

DONE. Signature mode in printBooklet(): TesseraBooklet.impose() orders pages onto duplex A4 sheets (front then back per physical sheet), bk-cut--fold divider (not cut), bkBindLeafSignature (pamphlet-stitch SVG, scissors-free numbered steps, sheet-count note w/ >5-sheet volume-split warning). `duplex` flag threaded through every leaf builder incl. the pagination probe so ±3mm duplex inset (bk-leaf--duplex, +3mm all sides — no physical evidence in PROGRESS.md yet to refine from, plan's placeholder kept) never desyncs measurement from render. Mode picker added to bk-preview (index.html/landing.css/landing.js), sequential still default. Fixed real wiring gap found along the way: js/booklet.js was never <script>-included in index.html or in sw.js CORE — TesseraBooklet didn't exist in-browser until this commit. Verified in-browser: signature output for 5 letters (20 leaves/5 sheets) checked position-by-position against a fresh impose(20) call, exact match every position; 5-sheet vs 6-sheet warning boundary both correct; sequential mode regression-checked post-refactor (0 duplex leaves, cut not fold); no console errors; 375px picker no overflow. Gate 1 green. Idempotent: mode picker defaults sequential, signature is additive.

DONE. /qa ran full: Gate 1 (18 files node --check, 7 suites green, no fixture diffs), Gate 2 (prose clean on all real copy changes), Gate 3 browser (seal->download->registry->reload loop via API, offline via SW cache contents, 375px DOM-verified after 2x screenshot-tool stalls, themes/reduced-motion regression-checked). QA surfaced two real issues, both fixed+committed same session: (1) US-Letter tolerance flag led to finding .booklet-sheet/pagination-probe were sized to the FULL nominal A4 page, ignoring @page's own margin -> overflowing on every sheet, A4 included (af1a9e3); (2) title/plates/colophon/bind leaves had no self-identifying mark -> added a page-position footer, every leaf (af1a9e3). Also implemented write-back interleaving (Task 2 Step 4, found unimplemented during the 'what's left' recap) - required a real storage schema bump 3->4 for registry inReplyTo (TDD, tools/test-state.js), composer now detects+retitles+reorders-by-written-date (51fcef0). Docs updated: PROGRESS.md snapshot, plan checkboxes (Tasks 1-3 all checked), decisions.md entry (a0b2ee3). Booklet Tasks 1-3 COMPLETE on dev. Remaining, both author-gated: Task 4 webfont decision (needs physical printer comparison, not started), Task 6 grief set (needs outside reader, separate from this job). Author already did one physical fold-check (signature mode, page order correct) before the geometry fix in (1) above - a re-check on the corrected geometry is recommended, not required, not blocking.

summary: v0.3 bound-booklet export (Tasks 1-3): imposition math, composer with write-back interleaving, imposed printable render (sequential + signature/duplex modes), all fixture/browser-verified, all committed to dev (unpushed). Two real bugs found and fixed via QA: margin-unaware print geometry (overflowed @page margin on every sheet, not just Letter paper) and missing self-identification on non-letter leaf kinds. Task 4 (webfont) and Task 6 (grief set) are separate, author-gated items outside this job's scope. .checkpoint/ can be deleted or kept as a record.
resume_hint: Job complete. If resuming later work on this feature: Task 4 (webfont) needs the author's physical printer to compare system-serif vs vendored EB Garamond print output side by side; Task 6 (grief set) needs an outside reader. Neither has a code starting point yet.
